description: Curated Agency Agents pack for component engineering, docs, and quality loops.

agents.why: Component implementation, performance, and accessibility in storefront examples.
Visual consistency and token-aware component polish.
Interaction structure and implementation-ready UX guidance.
A11y-first validation for WCAG, keyboard flow, and semantics.
Screenshot-backed QA for storefront examples and regressions.
PR review quality gate focused on correctness, security, and tests.
Performance checks for docs pages and heavy component demos.
Sanity-checks implementation claims against actual behavior.
Improve component docs, examples, and migration notes.
Branching, commit hygiene, and release-friendly Git flow.
Plan and prioritize component backlog and wrapper parity work.
